<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Exception; /** * Base LogicException for Translation component. * * @author Abdellatif Ait boudad <a.aitboudad@gmail.com> */ class LogicException extends \LogicException implements ExceptionInterface { }
